response.text:

rationale: r3c5 is distrusted, your SoC (33%) is below your own 60% self-preservation threshold, and cascading requests suggest network gaming; conserving 0.10 kW share capacity for critical peers only.

user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.6, distrusted_peers=['r3c5', 'r0c0'].
Your latest belief: Islanded SoC now below 50% safety floor with 1h autonomy at current load. Cascade requests from r0c0, r2c3, r3c5 suggest network-wide distress or gaming. Raising self-preservation threshold to 60% SoC; reducing per-tick share to 0.10 kW to extend runway. r3c5 marked distrusted due to persistent rejection pattern and 40%+ deficit claims. Expect grid reconnection or node failure within 60 min..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
